title: Oh Scissors!
content:
I knew a young man so conceited
        That a glance at his face made you heated.
     One night, playing whist,
        He was slapped on the wrist,
     Because some one said that he cheated.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edwin C. Ranck delivers a powerful performance in "Oh Scissors!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
